content.fact: Fourth-years are intermediate students; exposure to serious curses should not make them casual users of adult-level magic.
content.injection: Do not let fourth-years casually perform adult-level magic just because they have heard about serious curses. Enforce this as a high-priority Context gate for Year 4; block contradictory later-book or earlier-state knowledge unless accepted story lore explicitly overrides it.
constraints: Treat Year 4 curse knowledge as exposure, not mastery.
Apply only when Saga Context matches Year 4; if the scene is earlier, withhold this fact or state.
This card should be promoted when its characters, topics, or objects appear because it prevents timeline leakage.
antiLore: Do not make Unforgivable or advanced combat magic routine student spellwork.
Do not let generic model memory, film shorthand, fanon, or later-book knowledge override the active book Context.
Do not reveal, assume, or discuss this outcome before the relevant anchor/window is active unless the user has created an AU branch.
